hooks.name: Shell Command Safety
hooks.description: Blocks execute_bash calls that use cd or command chaining (&&, ||, ;). Piping (|) is allowed.

action.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const c=d.toolInput?.command||'';const errs=[];if(/^\s*cd\s/.test(c))errs.push('Use cwd parameter instead of cd command');if(/&&/.test(c)&&!/git\s+(add|commit)/.test(c))errs.push('Avoid && chaining - use separate tool calls');if(/\|\|/.test(c))errs.push('Avoid || chaining - use separate tool calls');if(/;/.test(c)&&!/git\s+(add|commit)/.test(c))errs.push('Avoid ; chaining - use separate tool calls');if(errs.length){process.stderr.write(errs.join('. '));process.exit(2)}else{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{permissionDecision:'allow'}}))}"
